title: Vanilla CPVP + FPS
description: x16 Pack design to have most vanilla textures but with a couple fps tweaks and make it more suitable for Professional Cpvp.
body:
# ⚔️🔥 Vanilla CPvP + FPS Boost Texture Pack 🔥⚔️
**_[My CurseForge ](https://www.curseforge.com/members/vo1dz)_**

A clean, competitive **Crystal PvP**-focused **texture pack** built for performance, clarity, and pure PvP advantage. Designed for **1.21.11+**, this pack removes distractions and boosts FPS so you can focus on what matters — winning fights. 💀

## _✨ Features ✨_
- **⚡ Low Fire** – Clearer screen during intense fights
- **💥 Small Totem Pops** – Less visual clutter when clutching
- **⚔️ Small Swords** – Better visibility in PvP
- **🚫 No Particles** – Cleaner combat & higher FPS
- **🔇 No Explosion Sounds** – Less audio clutter for better focus in fights
- **🛡️ Low Shield** – Reduced shield size for better visibility in fights
- **🖤 Black GUI** – Sleek, competitive interface
- **❌ No Animations** – Reduced lag + smoother performance
- **🎮 Vanilla Style** – Keeps the original Minecraft feel
- **🥔 Potato Textured Blocks** – Optimized for low-end PCs
## 
## _💎 Why This Pack? 💎_
This pack is built for **serious Crystal PvP players** who want every possible advantage in fights. By reducing visual noise and increasing FPS, you gain faster reaction time, better crystal placement visibility, and smoother combat control. ⚔️
📈 Using this pack can help improve your consistency in PvP, making it easier to:


- Track explosions and crystals clearly 💥
- React faster in close-range fights ⚡
- Stay focused without sound distractions 🔇
- Maintain higher FPS during intense battles 🎯


Not just for **Crystal PvP** — this pack also works great for:
**⚔️ Sword Pvp**

See the clean visuals, improved clarity, and FPS-boosted gameplay that gives you the competitive edge you need in PvP battles. 💪✨

## _🚀 Download & Dominate_
If you’re serious about climbing tiers in Crystal PvP and improving your gameplay, this pack is made for you. 🏆

_**THANKS FOR OVER 1K DOWNLOADS! WORKING ON NEW TEXTURES!**_
